languages.text: В стане Себериана завелся предатель, чьими руками Инквизиция дотягивается до самого сердца дворца.

traits.locale_text: В стане Себериана завелся предатель, чьими руками Инквизиция дотягивается до самого сердца дворца.

languages.text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.
languages.original_text: В стане Себериана завелся предатель, чьими руками Инквизиция дотягивается до самого сердца дворца.

traits.locale_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition now reaches into the very heart of the palace.
A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition now reaches into the very heart of the palace.
A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.
A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

languages.text: In Seberians Lager gibt es einen Verräter, einen Agenten, durch dessen Hände die Inquisition nach dem Herz des Palastes greift.
languages.original_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

traits.locale_text: In Seberians Lager gibt es einen Verräter, einen Agenten, durch dessen Hände die Inquisition nach dem Herz des Palastes greift.

languages.text: Le camp de Seberian abrite une taupe. À travers cet agent, l'Inquisition a accès au cœur même du palais.
languages.original_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

traits.locale_text: Le camp de Seberian abrite une taupe. À travers cet agent, l'Inquisition a accès au cœur même du palais.

languages.text: 塞贝里安的阵营中出现了一名叛徒。正是通过此人，审判庭将触手伸进了宫殿最深处。
languages.original_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安的阵营中出现了一名叛徒。正是通过此人，审判庭将触手伸进了宫殿最深处。

languages.text: Hay un traidor en el bando de Seberian, un agente que actúa al servicio de la Inquisición para proporcionarle acceso al mismísimo corazón del palacio.
languages.original_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

traits.locale_text: Hay un traidor en el bando de Seberian, un agente que actúa al servicio de la Inquisición para proporcionarle acceso al mismísimo corazón del palacio.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーは、セベリア陣営に裏切り者がおり、異端審問官がその手を使って宮殿の中枢に手を伸ばしていることを知った。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has learnt that there is a traitor in the Seberian camp, whose hands the Inquisition is using to reach into the heart of the palace.

languages.text: Seberian'ın yandaşları arasında bir hain, Engizisyon'u sarayın tam kalbine ulaştıran bir ajan ortaya çıktı.
languages.original_text: A traitor has emerged within Seberian's camp, an agent through whose hands the Inquisition reaches into the very heart of the palace.

traits.locale_text: Seberian'ın yandaşları arasında bir hain, Engizisyon'u sarayın tam kalbine ulaştıran bir ajan ortaya çıktı.
